testCases.scenario: AC1: Visit site and try to login
testCases.testCase: Sign in with valid credentials and land on /select-location
testCases.preCondition: Browser open at https://moontower.aiimone.com/Login; Email field and Sign In button visible
testSteps: Enter Email in the Email field
Enter Password in the Password field
testCases.expectedResult: Page redirects to /select-location; 'Select Your Location' heading is visible; 'Restaurant: <name>' paragraph confirms an account context was loaded
testCases.postCondition: User is authenticated and on the location-picker screen
testCases.linkedTestTitle: AC1 — valid credentials authenticate the user and route them to /select-location
